title: Phantom Rose
description: Phantom Rose is a roguelike deckbuilding card game. Fight and collect powerful cards as Reina, a maid exploring a mansion ravaged by evil creatures.◆ A Roguelike Card AdventureBuild your card deck and make careful decisions while you explore as each death may be permanent.◆ Manage Your DeckThere's no luck-based card draw during battle. Instead, manage your card's cooldown to defeat your foe swiftly and efficiently.◆ Defeat and CollectCollect over 100+ cards and powerful items by defeating phantoms & rescuing other maids in distress◆ Explore Through DangersVenture through areas of interest, danger, and place of safety to reach and defeat the crown phantoms for large rewards
description_short: Phantom Rose is a roguelike deckbuilding card game. Fight and collect powerful cards as Reina, a maid exploring a mansion ravaged by evil creatures
